uplink.description: Standard format (fPort 2): energy, volume, power, flow, flow/return temperature, serial and error flag.
uplink._note: Upstream cmi4130.js example: energy 1323210 kWh, volume 502222.5 m3, power 6.2 kW, flow 0.78 m3/h, flow_temperature 67.8 C, return_temperature 60.8 C, serial 277899033, error_flag 0. Normalized: kWh->Wh x1000, m3->L x1000, kW->W x1000, flow temp -> water.temperature.current.

uplink.description: Synthetic 40-byte standard payload exercising decimal=0 scales for every record type.
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream decode_cmi4130_standard yields energy 1000 kWh, volume 50 m3, power 5 kW, flow 2 m3/h, flow_temperature 70 C, return_temperature 45 C, serial 12345, error_flag 0. All records use decimal exponent 0 (VIFs 06/16/2e/3e/5b/5f). Covers metering.energy.total + metering.water.total + power.active in one frame.
Upstream switch default branch returns 'unknown FPort' for any fPort other than 2.

uplink.description: Payload shorter than 40 bytes is rejected.
uplink._note: Upstream gates on hex_array.length < 40 before parsing records.

uplink.description: Unknown format header byte is rejected.

errors: Payload type unknown, currently standard format supported

uplink._note: Upstream requires hex_array[0] == '0f'; byte[0]=0x10 triggers the unknown-format error.
